title: selliguea espinosae
intro: Selliguea espinosae, also known as the Polypodium espinosae or Polypodium pellucidum, is a species of fern found in Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selliguea espinosae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Selliguea espinosae can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by drying the leaves to make a powder that can be consumed or applied topically.
